---
title: "Caroline Martin"
---

## Caroline Martin

**Dates:** (Otterbourne 1850/1-1885)

### Description

‘poor Caroline Martin\'

### Biography

Daughter of James Martin and sister-in-law of George Backhurst, both agricultural labourers of Otterbourne.

### Letters

- Letter from Easter day [5 April 1885]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
